$comment: Fates (maturity tiers), capabilities (composable features), and archetypes (app shapes) for the mobile app factory. A remix plan declares fate + archetype + capabilities; `remix.mjs apply` materializes what it can and `check.mjs` audits a target app against its fate's checklist.

spike.title: Spike — prove the idea
spike.description: One happy path, hardcoded mock data, no auth, no error handling. Throwaway by design; exists to feel the core loop on a device.

checklist.text: Runs in Expo Go / dev client
The one core-loop screen works end to end with mock data

mvp.title: MVP — first real users
mvp.description: The full skeleton: navigation shell, auth decision made (auth, no-auth, or demo-mode), loading/empty/error states everywhere a user can reach, settings, and the core feature set.

checklist.text: Auth strategy decided and implemented (auth screens, no-auth, or demo-mode)
404 catch-all, error boundary, and empty states present
Light and dark mode both render correctly
Settings screen exists
npx tsc --noEmit passes

beta.title: Beta — TestFlight / internal track
beta.description: Updatable and observable: OTA updates wired, crashes and errors reported, basic analytics on the core loop, onboarding for first-run, a way for testers to give feedback.

checklist.text: EAS Update configured (channels, runtimeVersion policy)
Crash/error reporting SDK installed and initialized
Core-loop events tracked
First-run onboarding flow
Help/feedback screen reachable from settings
eas.json has preview + production build profiles
Version/build-number strategy set in app.json

store-ready.title: Store-ready — App Store / Play review
store-ready.description: Everything reviewers and real users hit: permission priming, legal screens, account deletion (Apple requires it when accounts exist), IAP-compliant paywall if monetized, deep links, offline behavior, localization scaffold, icons/splash, and review collateral.

checklist.text: Permission priming screens before every OS permission prompt
Privacy policy + terms reachable in-app
In-app account deletion (required by Apple when accounts exist)
Paywall shows price, term, restore purchases; uses IAP not web checkout
URL scheme + universal/app links configured
Offline/poor-network behavior defined (banner, cached data, retries)
Strings externalized; at least en locale complete
App icon, adaptive icon, splash configured in app.json
Accessibility pass: labels on touchables, dynamic type doesn't break layouts
Screenshots, description, privacy nutrition labels, review notes

flagship.title: Flagship — native-polish tier beyond store-ready
flagship.description: Everything store-ready demands, plus the native surfaces that make an app feel first-party: haptics on core interactions, home-screen widgets, quick actions, an in-app review loop — and a deliberate decision on Live Activities, watch app, App Intents, share extension, and App Clips for the domains where they fit.

checklist.text: At least one widget shipped (fed by the app-group snapshot)
Haptics on primary success, destructive confirm, selection
Icon quick actions deep-link to top actions
In-app review prompt wired to a delight moment
Live Activities: shipped for long-running state, or explicitly ruled out for this domain
Watch app / complication: shipped or ruled out
App Intents (Siri/Shortcuts/interactive widgets): shipped or ruled out
Share extension / App Clip: shipped or ruled out

skeleton-shell.title: Skeleton shell — login, loading, network boundaries, all error screens
skeleton-shell.description: The connective tissue every real app needs: welcome/login gate (or bypass), splash/loading states, ErrorBoundary, 404 catch-all, empty states, offline banner, and slots for maintenance / force-update screens.
setup: Wrap root layout in an ErrorBoundary
Add offline banner via NetInfo listener
Keep [...404].tsx catch-all

ota-updates.title: OTA updates (EAS Update)
ota-updates.description: Ship JS/asset fixes without a store review. Channels per environment, runtimeVersion policy so native/JS stay compatible, and an in-app force-update path for breaking changes.
setup: npx expo install expo-updates
eas update:configure
Set runtimeVersion { policy: 'appVersion' } in app.json
Map channels: preview → staging, production → production

auth.title: Full auth
auth.description: Login, signup, forgot/reset password, session persistence, edit profile, sign out — and account deletion for store review.
setup: Pick backend (supabase/convex) or keep mock AuthContext

no-auth.title: No auth
no-auth.description: Guest-only app: no accounts, no login wall. Skips auth screens entirely; personalization is device-local. Pairs naturally with local-first.
setup: Route entry straight to the main layout
Store preferences in AsyncStorage keyed to device

demo-mode.title: Demo mode
demo-mode.description: Try-before-signup: a 'Try Demo' path that runs the whole app on local storage with seeded data (pattern already in the boilerplate templates via EXPO_PUBLIC_DEMO_MODE).
setup: Add signInAsDemo() to AuthContext
Gate the Try Demo button on demoModeAvailable

local-first.title: Local-first
local-first.description: Device is the source of truth: AsyncStorage/SQLite/MMKV persistence, instant reads/writes, optional background sync when a backend appears later. The app works fully offline.
setup: Persist domain data locally (AsyncStorage for KV, expo-sqlite for relational)
Design IDs client-side (uuid) so sync can be added later
Queue mutations for eventual sync

onboarding.title: Onboarding
onboarding.description: First-run value pitch + progressive setup wizard (MultiStep pattern exists in all boilerplate templates).
setup: Persist onboarding-complete flag; route around it on later launches

permission-priming.title: Permission priming
permission-priming.description: Explain-then-ask screens shown before each OS permission dialog (location, notifications, camera) — most templates ship location-permission and notification-permission screens.
setup: Never trigger the OS prompt from cold start; always prime first

push-notifications.title: Push notifications
push-notifications.description: Expo push tokens, notification settings screen, opt-in tied to permission priming.
setup: Register token post-priming
Deep-link taps to the relevant screen

payments-iap.title: Payments (IAP via RevenueCat)
payments-iap.description: Subscription/paywall through StoreKit/Play Billing with RevenueCat; restore purchases; price + term shown on the paywall (review requirement).
setup: Configure RevenueCat offerings
Add Restore Purchases button
Gate pro features via isProUser

error-reporting.title: Crash & error reporting
error-reporting.description: Sentry (or similar) wired into the ErrorBoundary and global handlers so beta crashes are visible.
setup: sentry-expo init; wrap root; upload sourcemaps in EAS build

analytics.title: Product analytics
analytics.description: Screen views + core-loop events (PostHog/Amplitude/etc.). Keep the event list tiny and intentional at first.
setup: Track: first_open, onboarding_complete, core_action, subscribe

deep-links.title: Deep links
deep-links.description: URL scheme + universal/app links so shares, notifications, and marketing land on the right screen (expo-router gives you paths for free).
setup: Set scheme in app.json
Add associated domains / assetlinks for https links

i18n.title: Internationalization scaffold
i18n.description: Strings externalized into locales/ (en/es already present in the boilerplate templates) with a language settings screen.
setup: Route all user-facing strings through useTranslation()

legal.title: Legal & support
legal.description: Privacy policy, terms, and help/FAQ reachable in-app — reviewers look for these.
setup: Link privacy/terms in settings and on the paywall

account-deletion.title: Account deletion
account-deletion.description: In-app account deletion flow — Apple rejects account-based apps without it (Guideline 5.1.1(v)).
setup: Add Delete Account to settings → confirm → wipe backend + local state

feedback.title: Feedback channel
feedback.description: Help screen with contact/feedback so testers and users can reach you (all templates ship a help screen).
setup: Wire mailto/form; consider shake-to-report in beta

maps.title: Maps & location
maps.description: react-native-maps with live tracking patterns (drivo's DriveMap, propia/evento map screens).
setup: Platform API keys at build time; prime location permission first

widgets.title: Home-screen widgets
widgets.description: WidgetKit widgets (small/medium/lock-screen) fed by a snapshot the app writes to the shared app group; Android equivalent via Glance. Reference implementation: fitstake.
widgets.reference: fitstake: targets/widgets/*.swift (SparklineWidget, TrackerWidget, CountdownWidget), expo-target.config.js, plugins/withWidgetBridge.js, app/hooks/useWidgetSnapshot.ts
setup: npx expo install @bacons/apple-targets
Create targets/widgets with expo-target.config.js + a WidgetKit bundle
Write a snapshot JSON to the shared app group whenever core data changes (useWidgetSnapshot pattern)
Reload timelines via WidgetCenter after each snapshot write

live-activities.title: Live Activities & Dynamic Island
live-activities.description: ActivityKit Live Activities for long-running, glanceable state (order tracking, workout in progress, countdown, ride ETA) with Dynamic Island presentations; updatable via push. Reference implementation: fitstake.
live-activities.reference: fitstake: targets/widgets/FitStakeLiveActivity.swift + FitStakeAttributes.swift (ActivityAttributes + Dynamic Island regions), bridged through plugins/withWidgetBridge.js
setup: Define ActivityAttributes (static) + ContentState (dynamic) in the widget target
Provide lock-screen + Dynamic Island (compact/minimal/expanded) presentations
Bridge start/update/end to JS via a native module or config-plugin bridge
Set NSSupportsLiveActivities in Info.plist; use APNs 'liveactivity' pushes for remote updates
End activities deterministically — stale Live Activities are a review flag

watch-app.title: Apple Watch companion
watch-app.description: watchOS target mirroring the one core loop (glance + log + complication), sharing data via the app group or WatchConnectivity.
setup: Add a watch target via @bacons/apple-targets
Share state through the app group (same snapshot the widgets read)
Ship one complication — it's the retention surface

app-intents.title: Siri / Shortcuts / Spotlight (App Intents)
app-intents.description: Expose the core action as an App Intent so it works from Siri, Shortcuts, Spotlight, Action Button, and (with widgets) interactive widget buttons.
setup: Define an AppIntent per core action in the native target
Add an AppShortcutsProvider with natural phrases
Reuse the intents for interactive widget buttons (iOS 17+)

quick-actions.title: Home-screen quick actions
quick-actions.description: Long-press app icon shortcuts (and Android app shortcuts) that deep-link into the top 2–3 actions.
setup: npx expo install expo-quick-actions
Route each action through the deep-link scheme so it also works from widgets/notifications

share-extension.title: Share extension
share-extension.description: Receive content from other apps via the share sheet (save a link/photo/place into the app) — a growth loop for directory/collection apps.
setup: Handle incoming share payloads at the router entry
Map shared URLs/images to a create/save flow

app-clips.title: App Clip
app-clips.description: Sub-10MB instant experience for one transaction (view a listing, join a game, pay) launched from QR/NFC/links — pairs with no-auth flows.
setup: Add a clip target; keep it under the size budget
Scope to one flow; hand off state to the full app on install

biometrics.title: Biometric auth (Face ID / fingerprint)
biometrics.description: Local authentication gate for sensitive screens (wallet, journal, health data) and faster re-login.
setup: npx expo install expo-local-authentication
Set NSFaceIDUsageDescription
Always offer a passcode fallback

health-data.title: Health data (HealthKit / Health Connect)
health-data.description: Read/write steps, workouts, and vitals with explicit priming — verification patterns (anti-cheat step reads) in fitstake.
health-data.reference: fitstake: HealthKit step verification for wagers; caloria-v2: devices screen for wearable connections
setup: Prime before the HealthKit permission sheet
Request the minimum read/write set — over-asking is a review flag
Handle 'denied' gracefully; health data may be absent

camera-media.title: Camera & media
camera-media.description: Capture/pick/store photos and video with permission priming and graceful degradation.
setup: Prime camera/library permissions
Compress before upload; cache thumbnails locally

background-tasks.title: Background tasks & location
background-tasks.description: Background fetch/processing and (where justified) background location — refresh widgets, sync local-first queues, track an active session.
setup: Register tasks with expo-task-manager
Declare UIBackgroundModes only for what you use — unjustified modes get rejected
Budget work: background time is scarce and OS-throttled

haptics.title: Haptics
haptics.description: Tactile feedback on core interactions (success, selection, game events) — cheap native polish.
setup: Feedback on: primary action success, destructive confirm, selection changes, game outcomes
Respect the system reduce-motion/haptics settings

store-review.title: In-app review prompt
store-review.description: SKStoreReviewController / Play in-app review, asked at a moment of delight (goal hit, streak, booking confirmed) — never on launch.
setup: Trigger after a success event, max ~3 prompts/year per Apple's budget
Gate behind: used N days AND just succeeded at the core action

marketplace.title: Marketplace / booking
marketplace.description: Listings, detail, filters, checkout, reviews, buyer/seller chat

directory.title: Directory / listings
directory.description: Browsable catalog of places/things: search, filters, detail pages, favorites, map view — commerce optional

social.title: Social / community
social.description: Feed, posting, profiles, DMs, follows, notifications

game.title: Mobile game (casual)
game.description: Game loop screens, session history, streaks/leaderboards, wallet/currency, IAP; fitstake adds wager/competition mechanics

tracker.title: Tracker / habit / health
tracker.description: Log entries, progress charts, streaks, goals; HealthKit patterns in fitstake

ai-assistant.title: AI assistant / chat
ai-assistant.description: Chat thread, voice input, provider settings, suggestion chips, paywall; voyage adds tool-calling via API routes

on-demand.title: On-demand / ride / delivery
on-demand.description: Live map, request flow, tracking, driver/courier chat, wallet

travel.title: Travel / itinerary
travel.description: Trips, bookings, itineraries, saved places, price tracking

media-feed.title: Media / content feed
media-feed.description: Content stream, detail view, saves, subscription gate

utility.title: Utility / single-purpose tool
utility.description: One job done well (weather, converter, scanner); often no-auth + local-first

saas-companion.title: SaaS companion / dashboard
saas-companion.description: KPIs, alerts, quick actions against an existing product's API
